programme.title: E16 - 可樓芳美芝拿捏蘇有朋
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E6 - 霸總用爆燈搶心儀求職者
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E13 - 三大特色大賽爆笑來襲
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E6 - 霸總用爆燈搶心儀求職者
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E207 - Don't Go Grandma / Stuck / Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia try to stop Grandma from leaving, so they can spend more time with her / When Terri & Tommy get locked in the Garden Dome, they must put their differences aside to try to escape / Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.

programme.title: E720 - Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle and the playgroup are sharing their best nursery rhymes with each other.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E210 - Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: E207 - Don't Go Grandma / Stuck / Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia try to stop Grandma from leaving, so they can spend more time with her / When Terri & Tommy get locked in the Garden Dome, they must put their differences aside to try to escape / Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.

programme.title: E306 - Baby Steel / Joke's On You
programme.desc: When Steel accidentally turns himself into a baby, he wreaks havoc on Platinum City. // It's the annual 'Day of Fun'! However when Ricardo and Trickalien play the ultimate prank on the Deer Squad, the day of fun soon turns into a day of chaos!

programme.title: E823 - Super Potato Movie
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit the cinema for the first time to watch the Super Potato movie!

programme.title: E207 - The Crew Builds Charger A Super Bed / The Crew Builds A Super Squirrely Whi
programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E210 - Pups Save A Talent Show / Pups Save The Corn Roast
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Talent Show Day! When the mayor is afraid there won't be enough acts, the super talented Pups can definitely help out! // When Chickaletta gets trapped in a Corn Field Maze, the PAW Patrol races to the rescue!

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on 'Thesee', a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: E606 - Pups And The Stinky Bubble Trouble / Pups Save The Baby Ostriches
programme.desc: What's that smell? A strange odor is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes. // Olivia the Ostrich has fallen in to the canyon! The pups need to work together to lift her to safety, while keeping her soon-to-hatch eggs warm.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E623 - Campfire Stories
programme.desc: It's a campout under the stars! Blaze, AJ, Starla, Crusher, and Pickle are gathered around the campfire to tell the most amazing stories they can make up! And the best part? Whoever tells the best story wins the last marshmallow!

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: E115 - Tiny Dancer
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back.

programme.title: E101 - The Mystery On The Monsoon Express
programme.desc: Animal detectives Sam and Kit collect all the clues while searching for the slithering suspect who bit an express train's engineer.

programme.title: E827 - Valentine's Day
programme.desc: It is Valentine's Day and Daddy Pig gives Mummy Pig a card but Where's Daddy Pig's card from Mummy? Mummy Pig had put it in the post, but it hasn't arrived yet. Will Daddy Pig get a card?

programme.title: E830 - The Botanical Gardens
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy take Peppa and George for a day out at the botanical gardens. There is so much to see and learn and Miss Rabbit and Mr Rabbit are there to tell them all about it.

programme.title: E424 - Pups Save Francois The Penguin / Pups Save Daring Danny's Hippo
programme.desc: Francois and a baby penguin get caught on the other side of a carvasse. // Daring Danny wants a cool pet of his own, so he can't believe his luck when a stray baby hippo finds him.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po enjoy Tiddlytubbies Songtime. Then it is time for Teletubbies Songtime. The Teletubbies sing solo before singing all together.

programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and 'Do the Tubby!'.

Tubig To Handle
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. Watch as fearless contestants dive headfirst into epic water obstacle challenges, face hilarious wipeouts, and battle it out for BIG prizes. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.title: Pamilya Talk With Tita Jing S5
programme.desc: Be inspired and learn new things with Tita Jing as she talks about family and life

programme.title: Juan Conversations With Rose Eclarinal S3
programme.desc: The show highlights the personal journeys, challenges and truimphs of ordinary and extraordinary overseas Filipinos. Produced and hosted by Rose Eclarinal

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: It is a revival and modernization of the iconic Philippine youth talk, and debate show Y Speak that originally aired on Studio 23 from 2004 to 2010. The updated version continues to explore how we can positively help shape the character of our young people and, ultimately, the future of our nation. It guides the youth to listen to the past, discern the present, and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: is the continuous story on how we can positively help shape the character of our young people, and eventually, the future of our nation. It is guiding the youth to listen to the past, discern today and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: E15 - French Guiana (Part 1)
programme.desc: Between Suriname and Brazil, French Guiana is the only French department in South America. The adventure begins in Maripasoula, on the Maroni River, with a canoe trip to discover traditional Bushinengue villages. Stops in Papaichton and Belikampo, then Saint-Laurent-du-Maroni, whose history remains marked by the penal colony.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: History Goes Interactive: Learning Through Tech
programme.desc: Digital technology unlocks new ways to explore history through VR, AR and games - but social media can oversimplify or distort facts.

programme.title: Flamenco, Perestroika And Mishpocha
programme.desc: The meteoric rise of genre-busting pop icon Rosalia. The collapse of the Soviet Union as told through detailed eyewitness accounts. And: Beastie Boys founder Mike D's tribute to 'mishpocha.'

programme.title: Racing After A Heart Transplant
programme.desc: After suffering two sudden cardiac deaths and a number of severe health complications, 32-year-old Tamara Schwab's life was saved by a heart transplant. She's now vowed not to waste a single minute of her second stint at life and is pushing herself to the limit to compete in the World Transplant Games. But can her body take it?

programme.title: Lured Into War: Russia's Foreign Fighters In Ukraine
programme.desc: Russia is using foreign fighters in its war against Ukraine. Often, they are from poorer countries in Africa, Asia, and Latin America.

programme.title: Where Everything Disappears
programme.desc: A video diary from the frontline trenches: Ukrainian commander and cameraman Dmytro Dokunov can't save his comrades. Can he free himself from the horror of the Russian attack on Ukraine?

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: E159
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

E1 - Shannon Price
programme.desc: Years after Gary Coleman’s controversial and tragic death, his ex-wife agrees to take a polygraph test to confront lingering suspicions and silence the rumours that she was responsible for his death.

programme.title: E5 - Evil In Cajun Country
programme.desc: The town of Alexandria, Louisiana, is rocked when the body of Courtney Coco, 19, is found dumped 200 miles from home in Winnie, Texas.

programme.title: E3 - Terri (Part A)
programme.desc: Terri is a woman of very few words. When she does speak, she is sincere and prideful. She is now retired from her successful careers as both an EMI of 40 years and a fire department EMT of 10 years.

programme.title: E3 - Spud, Digger, and Tommy
programme.desc: Explore Tasmanian devils’ softer side, meet a pioneering sea turtle, and enjoy family dinner with Buttons the deer. Play football with 800-kilogram Spud the bull and learn how Digger the owl soothed conservationist Nigel during his cancer treatment.

programme.title: E3 - Meerkat Survival School
programme.desc: Learn how to disarm and dine on scorpions with meerkat pups in the Kalahari Desert and review a lioness’ flirting strategy in Kenya. Meet same-sex penguin couples who are raising chicks together, then sign up for an Asian elephant babysitters’ club.

programme.title: E3 - Spud, Digger, and Tommy
programme.desc: Explore Tasmanian devils’ softer side, meet a pioneering sea turtle, and enjoy family dinner with Buttons the deer. Play football with 800-kilogram Spud the bull and learn how Digger the owl soothed conservationist Nigel during his cancer treatment.

programme.title: E3 - Meerkat Survival School
programme.desc: Learn how to disarm and dine on scorpions with meerkat pups in the Kalahari Desert and review a lioness’ flirting strategy in Kenya. Meet same-sex penguin couples who are raising chicks together, then sign up for an Asian elephant babysitters’ club.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Seduction
programme.desc: Discover the story of the much loved Sausage Tree, whose nectar filled blooms and sausage shaped fruits entice animals of all kinds, from insects to elephants. See how the very animals who rely on this generous tree ensure its proliferation.

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees
programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: E2 - Sanctuary of the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: On Africa's east coast, the warm Agulhas run south with a distinctive subtropical landscape. Made up of everything from mangrove swamps to colorful coral reefs, the area has marine turtles - who breed on long and warm sandy beaches - and a recently found population of 'living fossils', the Coelacanth, which dwell in deep, submarine canyons.

programme.title: E1 - The Young Up-Start
programme.desc: Explore the lush treed cityscape where fluffy male Matnoor rules over the 30-member-strong Street Troop with an iron fist. Then meet Aarav, the old alpha who oversees the wilder Hill Troop. Which will up-and-comer Loci challenge for the crown?

programme.title: E4 - Tidelands
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: Gaza Fixer - Locked Out Locked In
Love For All Seasons
programme.desc: Millionaire Tiger Hung is told to find cure at the mysterious all-women martial arts sect Omei, and there he meets Omei's young master May. The healing process moves smoothly until May's big sister Misery shows up and challenges May into a duel. Misery has lost her mind and she threatens to destroy Omei unless May beats her with the sect's long-lost 'Heartbreak Sword Technique'...

programme.title: Prison On Fire
programme.desc: The plot mostly involves the two main characters, Ching and Yiu and problems they face with Mickey, a fellow inmate and “Scarface”, a high-ranking officer. Yiu is sentenced to three years for manslaughter. In a fight for his father, he kicked a man onto the path of a bus. Ching was sent to prison for killing his wife for being a prostitute. During the end of the film, inmates decide to go on hunger strike to protest against the cigarette price rise, this causes problems with “Assassin”. Ching bit “Scarface”‘s ear off and gets an extended sentence, Yiu is released from the prison.

programme.title: Radiance

programme.title: E2 - The Titan Games Trials 2
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.desc: Gustaakh Ishq

programme.title: Race 2
programme.desc: Ranvir treads through the world of the Indian mafia in Turkey as he looks to avenge the death of his lover and partner-in-crime. Release Year: 2013 Director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla, Mustan Alibhai Burmawalla, Awards: 2014 Winner Special Award- Power Club - Box Office Award, 2014 Winner Apsara Award- Hall of Fame

programme.title: Ek Tha Tiger
programme.desc: Agent Tiger is sent to Dublin to observe a scientist. There he falls in love with the latter's caretaker, who is an ISI agent. Release Year: 2012 Director: Kabir Khan Awards: People's Choice Awards- Favorite Movie, Favourite Movie Actor- Salman Khan, Favourite Action Movie Star- Salman

programme.title: E9 - China
programme.desc: In China, Rooftop and Catfish continue their East Asian adventures. As if the leeches in Indonesia weren’t enough, the bikers move on to bee sting therapy in China, strengthen their stomachs with some grasshoppers and mice wine, and attempt to transport hundreds of pounds of fish on nothing but a bike and sheer will power. The duo also undergo a hike of Chinese mountain Hua Shan, electro acupuncture, and kung fu train, all to be able to endure dim mak, ‘the death touch.’ Can Rooftop and Catfish handle this intense physical journey, or will the death touch get the best of them?

programme.title: E6 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E10 - Southern Discomfort
programme.desc: An inner-city youth mentor, who is scared of the wild, joins Bear Grylls for an adventure outside his comfort zone. Brandon’s mission is to face his fears and inspire kids in his community.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: In this episode Jamie's got recipes that make a hero of the freezer and store cupboard: using frozen fish to save on time, money and planning; making a super-speedy snack that gives frozen veggies their place in the sun; and two hearty dishes that elevate store-cupboard staples to the next level. And he's called on his mentor and all-round Italian legend, Gennaro Contaldo, to rustle up some delicious homemade gnocchi using just 5 easy ingredients.

programme.title: Soul Snatcher
programme.desc: To achieve immortality, fox spirit Bai Shisan disguises as a young man and travels to the human world in search of a divine pill. There he befriends the innocent scholar Wang Zijin shom he later realizes is the key to his transcendence. To keep Wang safe, Bai must bond with him on his road to the imperial examination and fends off threats from mythic creatures and evil spirits.

programme.title: My Left Eye Sees Ghosts
programme.desc: May marries Daniel during holiday and inherits all money after his death. One night she suffers a fatal car accident. Ken comes to save her life and strange things happen...

programme.title: Election
programme.desc: The time has come, as it does every two years, for the senior members of Hong Kong's oldest Triad, The Wo Shing Society, to elect a new chairman. Fierce rivalries emerge between the two eligible candidates. Lok, respected by the Uncles is the favorite to win. But his rival Big D will stop at nothing to change this, including going against hundreds of years of Triad tradition and influencing the vote with money and violence.

programme.title: The Rising Star -Ho Kai Wa
programme.desc: Ho Kai Wa was first seen for his exceptional dancing skill, yet dancing was only a stepping stone to pursue his dream of becoming an actor. He often brings joy to the audience, but behind the scene he actually bears immense pressure since was overwhelmed by the 'comedic relief' label. Now that he has established himself in the film industry with two films grossed over HK$100 million at the box office. It seems that he has achieved his dream, yet he feels lost and disoriented... In this episode, Kai Wa will shed his on-screen image and talk about his film journey.

programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: E3 - Flipping The Botched Facelift
programme.desc: James takes on a dying home in need of a major facelift: a 104-year-old house brought to him by a rookie flipper. With the property in dire condition, James and his team must rethink the layout.

programme.title: E2 - Spinach Feta Pie & Baklava
programme.desc: Drawing on his travels, Jake puts his twist on boreka hand pies, filled with tender white beans, spinach and feta. This recipe can work as a side dish or is hearty enough to be the main course.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: When web model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, 'IRL' takes on a whole new level of meaning for Kara.

programme.title: Kshatriya

programme.title: Arjun Patiala
programme.desc: Arjun Patiala is a quirky small-town cop, who is fond of women and even more fond of his drinks. His original and unusual ideas help reduce crime rate in the town.

programme.desc: Following a failed assassination attempt on a U.S. senator, OA and Maggie are tasked with escorting her back to Washington, D.C. on a flight that becomes more perilous than imagined.
